utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , Danielle ! I was not expecting the machine .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Give me a call when you get a chance .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: That is what you have been working on for the past two hours ? !

emotion_cause.span: 5_That is what you have been working on for the past two hours ? !
5_That is what you have been working on for the past two hours ? !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , uh ... I want her to think I might be in a restaurant ... you know ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I might have some kind of life , like I have not been sitting around here honing for the past few hours .

emotion_cause.span: 9_been sitting around here honing for the past few hours

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Look look ! He is doing it again , the guy with the telescope !

emotion_cause.span: 10_He is doing it again , the guy with the telescope !
10_He is doing it again , the guy with the telescope !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Go away ! Stop looking in here !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Great , now he is waving back .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Man , we gotta do something about that guy . This morning , I caught him looking into our apartment . It creeps me out ! I feel like I can not do stuff !

emotion_cause.span: 14_This morning , I caught him looking into our apartment . It creeps me out ! I feel like I can not do stuff !
14_I feel like I can not do stuff !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Will you grow up ? I am not talking about sexy stuff , but , like , when I am cooking naked .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah , toast , oatmeal ... nothing that spatters .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: What are you looking at me for ? I did not know that .

emotion_cause.span: 19_What are you looking at me for ?
